metadata.title: 2026 World Cup GIS | Live Map Tracking
metadata.description: Experience the 2026 World Cup through our immersive live GIS map platform. Track stadiums, matches, and team dynamics in real-time.

WorldCup.gisDescription: Discover stadiums, track team routes, and explore live stats in a complete interactive geospatial experience.
WorldCup.launchAppDesc: Open our standalone high-performance geospatial application to track live tournament dynamics, transit heatmaps, and stadium telemetry.
WorldCup.installAppDetails: For the best experience, install our application directly to your device. On mobile, tap
WorldCup.onDesktop: On desktop, click the install icon (↓) in your browser's address bar.
WorldCup.clickVenues: Click on pins to explore stadium telemetry and host city details.
WorldCup.viewTeamInfo: Select team icons to view basecamps and current standings.
WorldCup.realTimeSchedules: Use the timeline slider to track real-time match schedules.
WorldCup.subdomainNotice: * Opens in a separate secure sandbox window for enhanced GPU hardware acceleration rendering.
WorldCup.installAppSubheading: Get the native experience on your device in two easy steps.

installSteps.iosStep2: Scroll down and select 'Add to Home Screen'.
installSteps.androidStep2: Select 'Install app' or 'Add to Home screen'.
installSteps.desktopStep1: Look for the install icon in the URL bar.
installSteps.desktopStep2: Click it and follow the prompt to install.
